Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Valtara Systems Ltd by Alderbank Capital plc (UK Main Market issuer); summary prepared for diligence coordination and does not introduce new inside information for UK MAR purposes.
Parties: Buyer — Alderbank Capital plc; Seller — Kestrel Ridge Holdings SPV Ltd; Target — Valtara Systems Ltd; transaction structure: share purchase of 100% of issued share capital.
Consideration and headline terms remain as previously announced via Alderbank RNS dated 05/03/2025; no price-sensitive updates are included in this document and no wall-crossing is effected by receipt of it.
Regulatory: FCA Listing Rules and Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules compliance to be maintained; any change in control notifications in respect of Valtara’s regulated subsidiary to be filed if required; CMA filings assessed as not required based on public turnover thresholds.
Market abuse controls: insider list procedures and clean team protocol per Compliance Memo CM-UKMAR-17 (appended); no selective disclosure, and no MNPI is needed for this phase.
Data protection: Schedule 3 Data Processing Addendum (DPA) to govern HR, payroll, and client file processing; data minimisation applied — only fields listed in Onboarding Form Template F-ONB-001 will be shared.
Privacy status: no outstanding DSARs, erasure requests, or consent withdrawal notices affecting Target systems as at the date of this term sheet; retention schedules adopted (POL-RET-05) and confirmed in an internal compliance memo referencing ICO guidance.
Intentional positive: one cross-border transfer for VDR mirroring is approved under the UK IDTA to a non-UK processor (BrinkCloud Norland SA), Data-Export Approval REF: UK-DEX-041; scope limited to redacted financials, org charts, and policy registers.
Onboarding materials: sample Employee Onboarding Form (blank) circulated for process review only; fields include [First Name], [Last Name], [Work Email], [Sort Code XX-XX-XX], [Account No 00000000], [NINO AAA000A]; no live PII will be uploaded.
Employment: TUPE not expected; fitness and propriety attestations for regulated roles to be collected during integration; queries via hr-compliance@valtara.example.
Information barriers: clean team members only; anonymised or aggregated client datasets used; any receipt of MNPI will trigger withdrawal procedures and Listing Rule notifications where applicable.
Records management: retention — transactional files to be held for six years post-completion; auto-deletion controls are enabled and tested; this is a policy statement and does not indicate a pending erasure event.
Conditions precedent: execution of DPA schedules, confirmation that any prior DSARs were closed with no further action required, and receipt of standard third-party consents; no financing condition precedent beyond committed facilities.
Notices and contacts: deal queries to compliance@alderbank.example; data protection queries to privacy@valtara.example; public ICO helpline references may be consulted but are not engaged for this transaction.
Governing law: England and Wales; Schedules — (A) Compliance Memo (UK MAR), (B) DPA Schedule, (C) Clean Team Rules, (D) Data-Export Approval, (E) Onboarding Form Template; any identifier examples herein are illustrative only and not operative.
